title: Customers With Largest Single Order Share
description: Find customers whose single largest order contributes more than 70% of their total spending.
sql_solution: SELECT customer_id FROM (SELECT customer_id, MAX(amount)*1.0/SUM(amount) ratio FROM orders GROUP BY customer_id) WHERE ratio > 0.7;
pyspark_solution:
from pyspark.sql.functions import *

result = (
    orders.groupBy("customer_id")
    .agg((max("amount") * lit(1.0) / sum("amount")).alias("ratio"))
    .filter(col("ratio") > 0.7)
    .select("customer_id")
)
